notes: SHIP v1.14.347 - OPERATOR WIPE / site-profile save data loss. Owner: 'ok please fix' 2026-07-23, on the pre-existing bug the .346 rd-review surfaced. BUG (live since the v2 editor, NOT introduced by .346): siteProfile_saveFromEditor built a FRESH 9-key object literal and handed it to siteProfile_save, so every profile field the editor has no input for was silently destroyed on save. `operator` above all - the tech's name, which stamps every sign-off and handoff (getContextBlock, firstRun_renderChip, handoff records). Nothing in the app could restore it: the editor had no name field, and the first-run gate that collects it never fires twice (confirmedAt is already stamped). It also dropped confirmedAt (survived only by siteProfile_load's lastUpdated backfill, i.e. by luck) and, as of .346, the new `sources` provenance map. Bug class = the same silent-data-destruction shape as the hard rule 'merge, never overwrite: hand-entered values always win and always survive reloads' - this path violated the SURVIVE half. FIX (2 edits): (1) siteProfile_saveFromEditor now starts from siteProfile_load() - the stored profile - and overwrites ONLY the 8 fields the editor actually owns, so anything else present survives untouched, this ship and every future field. (2) rd-gated YOUR NAME field added at the top of the editor (sp-operator) so a name already wiped by a pre-.347 save can be typed back; a BLANK box is treated as 'no change', never as 'erase my name'. PROVENANCE INTERACTION (.346 seam): a Master-filled field the human types over in the editor now has its sources[field]='master' tag DROPPED - the value is theirs, so no future Master reload can overwrite it; a field left exactly as the Master set it keeps its tag and stays refreshable. That is the merge-never-overwrite contract holding across both write paths. NOT DONE: no data recovery for names already lost (the old value was overwritten in localStorage, it is gone) - the new field is the repair path. legacy editor untouched (both new surfaces rd-gated) -> ?legacy=1 byte-identical. Gates: inline-JS vm.Script x3, CSS brace net-0 (no CSS touched), three-stamp .346->.347, surgical diff, offline assertions on the shipped save path (operator survives, confirmedAt survives, sources survive, edited field drops its tag, untouched field keeps it, blank name box is a no-op). DEVICE-VERIFY (clear SW first): SITE PROFILE sheet -> YOUR NAME shows your operator name -> change PDU TYPE -> SAVE -> reopen: your name is STILL THERE (pre-.347 it vanished). Then load the Master again: your edited PDU TYPE survives, untouched Master fields still refresh. ROLLBACK: revert this commit.
